category_sources: source_facts.description says halp is a CLI tool to get help with CLI tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is halp and source_facts.homepage is the official halp.cli.rs site.
docs_sources: Official homepage at source_facts.homepage is the primary documentation surface; official GitHub README provides usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a terminal CLI help tool; source_facts.repo identifies the official Rust project repository.
